'''âv-f-r''' ('''kavafar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quickstep|quickstep]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-f-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quickstep|quickstep]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-f-r
|-
! Lemma
| kavafar
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivafar|thivafar]] || [[word:jivafar|jivafar]] || [[word:shivafar|shivafar]] || [[word:kivafar|kivafar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvafar|thuthuvafar]] || [[word:jujuvafar|jujuvafar]] || [[word:shushuvafar|shushuvafar]] || [[word:kukuvafar|kukuvafar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvafar|thuvafar]] || [[word:juvafar|juvafar]] || [[word:shuvafar|shuvafar]] || [[word:kuvafar|kuvafar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvafar|thuvafar]] || [[word:juvafar|juvafar]] || [[word:shuvafar|shuvafar]] || [[word:kuvafar|kuvafar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevafar|thevafar]] || [[word:jevafar|jevafar]] || [[word:shevafar|shevafar]] || [[word:kevafar|kevafar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovafar|thothovafar]] || [[word:jojovafar|jojovafar]] || [[word:shoshovafar|shoshovafar]] || [[word:kokovafar|kokovafar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovafar|thovafar]] || [[word:jovafar|jovafar]] || [[word:shovafar|shovafar]] || [[word:kovafar|kovafar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovafar|thovafar]] || [[word:jovafar|jovafar]] || [[word:shovafar|shovafar]] || [[word:kovafar|kovafar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠvafar|thĂŠvafar]] || [[word:jĂŠvafar|jĂŠvafar]] || [[word:shĂŠvafar|shĂŠvafar]] || [[word:kĂŠvafar|kĂŠvafar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavafar|thathavafar]] || [[word:jajavafar|jajavafar]] || [[word:shashavafar|shashavafar]] || [[word:kakavafar|kakavafar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavafar|thavafar]] || [[word:javafar|javafar]] || [[word:shavafar|shavafar]] || [[word:kavafar|kavafar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavafar|thavafar]] || [[word:javafar|javafar]] || [[word:shavafar|shavafar]] || [[word:kavafar|kavafar]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shavafar|shavafar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshavafar|goshavafar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishavafar|gokishavafar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shavafarnĂŒ|shavafarnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshavafarnknĂŒ|goshavafarnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishavafarnĂŒ|gokishavafarnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shavafarshĂ«|shavafarshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshavafarnkshĂ«|goshavafarnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishavafarshĂ«|gokishavafarshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavafaro|shavafaro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavafarnkro|goshavafarnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavafaro|gokishavafaro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shavafarmu|shavafarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavafarnkmu|goshavafarnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavafarmu|gokishavafarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shavafarsher|shavafarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshavafarnksher|goshavafarnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishavafarsher|gokishavafarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shavafarng|shavafarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshavafarnkng|goshavafarnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishavafarng|gokishavafarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shavafarya|shavafarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshavafarnkya|goshavafarnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishavafarya|gokishavafarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shavafaryam|shavafaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshavafarnkyam|goshavafarnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishavafaryam|gokishavafaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavafarnĂŒshĂ«|shavafarnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavafarnknĂŒshĂ«|goshavafarnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavafarnĂŒshĂ«|gokishavafarnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavafarnĂŒro|shavafarnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavafarnknĂŒro|goshavafarnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavafarnĂŒro|gokishavafarnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavafarnĂŒmu|shavafarnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavafarnknĂŒmu|goshavafarnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavafarnĂŒmu|gokishavafarnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavafarshĂ«nĂŒ|shavafarshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavafarnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshavafarnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavafarshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishavafarshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavafarshĂ«ro|shavafarshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavafarnkshĂ«ro|goshavafarnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavafarshĂ«ro|gokishavafarshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavafarshĂ«mu|shavafarshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavafarnkshĂ«mu|goshavafarnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavafarshĂ«mu|gokishavafarshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavafaronĂŒ|shavafaronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavafarnkronĂŒ|goshavafarnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavafaronĂŒ|gokishavafaronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavafaroshĂ«|shavafaroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavafarnkroshĂ«|goshavafarnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavafaroshĂ«|gokishavafaroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavafaromu|shavafaromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavafarnkromu|goshavafarnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavafaromu|gokishavafaromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavafarmunĂŒ|shavafarmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavafarnkmunĂŒ|goshavafarnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavafarmunĂŒ|gokishavafarmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavafarmushĂ«|shavafarmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavafarnkmushĂ«|goshavafarnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavafarmushĂ«|gokishavafarmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavafarmuro|shavafarmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavafarnkmuro|goshavafarnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavafarmuro|gokishavafarmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
